---
title: "Academy Courses"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Comprehensive technical training programs"
description: "Explore comprehensive courses in cybersecurity, open-source development, Linux administration, data privacy, and security awareness training."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:60vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Courses</h1>
    <p>Multi-week programs that build deep expertise through hands-on projects and expert instruction.</p>
    <a href="#courses" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Explore courses</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">7</div><div class="m-nl">Courses</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">4–12</div><div class="m-nl">Weeks each</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">80%</div><div class="m-nl">Hands-on</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Certification</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- COURSE GRID — image cards -->
<div class="m-s" id="courses" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Seven courses, one goal</h2>
    <p class="sub">Practical skills taught by practitioners, not textbooks.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/practical-cybersecurity/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Practical Cybersecurity">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">12 weeks</div>
              <h3>Practical Cybersecurity</h3>
              <p>Network security, pentesting, and incident response.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/open-source-development/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Open Source Development">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">8 weeks</div>
              <h3>Open Source Development</h3>
              <p>Git workflows, licensing, and contributing to real projects.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/unix-linux-administration/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Unix/Linux Administration">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">10 weeks</div>
              <h3>Unix/Linux Administration</h3>
              <p>Shell scripting, service management, and performance tuning.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/data-protection-privacy/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Data Protection">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">6 weeks</div>
              <h3>Data Protection & Privacy</h3>
              <p>GDPR, CCPA, privacy-by-design, and breach response.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/cyberhygiene-essentials/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Cyberhygiene Essentials">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">6 weeks</div>
              <h3>Cyberhygiene Essentials</h3>
              <p>Digital threat awareness, device protection, and safe practices.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/human-firewall-security-awareness/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Human Firewall">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">4 weeks</div>
              <h3>Human Firewall</h3>
              <p>Security awareness, social engineering defense, and culture building.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-4 mt-1 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/courses/nixos-cybersecurity/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="NixOS for Cybersecurity">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">4 weeks</div>
              <h3>NixOS for Cybersecurity</h3>
              <p>Declarative security, reproducible environments, and system hardening.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DELIVERY FORMATS -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Three ways to learn</h2>
    <p class="sub">Pick the format that fits your schedule.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-camera-video" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Instructor-Led Online</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Live virtual sessions with real-time interaction, guided exercises, and recorded replays.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-play-circle" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Self-Paced Online</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">On-demand video lessons, downloadable resources, and forum support at your own speed.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">In-Person Workshops</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Immersive hands-on sessions at our facilities or on-site at your organization.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Find the right course<br>for your team</h2>
    <p>Custom cohorts, flexible scheduling, and group pricing available for organizations.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Expert instructors &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Certification included &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Updated quarterly
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
